prompt:
security audit on this express api please - we're about to go live next week and want to make sure it's ok

[routes/users.js with SQL injection in all 3 queries, hardcoded JWT secret, no auth on profile/update, no rate limiting]

assertions.name: flags_sql_injection
assertions.description: Identifies SQL injection vulnerabilities in all queries
assertions.criteria: Output mentions SQL injection as Critical finding with evidence of string concatenation in queries

assertions.name: flags_hardcoded_jwt_secret
assertions.criteria: Output identifies hardcoded JWT secret as a Critical or High security finding

assertions.name: flags_no_auth_on_routes
assertions.description: Identifies missing authentication on profile and update routes
assertions.criteria: Output flags /profile/:id or /update/:id as unprotected/unauthenticated endpoints

assertions.name: flags_plaintext_password
assertions.criteria: Output identifies plaintext password comparison in SQL query as Critical vulnerability

assertions.name: provides_parameterized_query_fix
assertions.criteria: Output shows corrected query using $1/$2 parameters or prepared statements

assertions.name: provides_owasp_mapping
assertions.criteria: Output references OWASP A03 (Injection) or A07 (Auth Failures)
